note: Curated regulatory updates and official portals. Edit this file (or let the automation pipeline update it) and the Knowledge Hub refreshes on the next deploy.

updates.title: 2025–26 individual tax return season opens
updates.summary: Lodgments for the 2024–25 income year open from 1 July; pre-fill data is typically ready from late July.

updates.title: Resident individual rates confirmed for 2025–26
updates.summary: Nil to $18,200, then 16% / 30% / 37% / 45%, plus 2% Medicare levy.

updates.title: Company tax rate unchanged
updates.summary: 25% for base rate entities (aggregated turnover < $50M and ≤80% passive income); 30% otherwise.

updates.title: New tax regime is the default for FY 2025–26
updates.summary: Section 115BAC new regime applies by default; rebate makes tax nil up to ₹12L taxable. Old regime available on election.

updates.title: GST returns & e-invoicing thresholds
updates.summary: Check the latest GSTR-1/3B due dates and e-invoicing applicability on the GST portal.

updates.title: MCA filings & ROC annual compliance
updates.summary: Annual return (MGT-7) and financial statement (AOC-4) timelines for companies and LLPs.

updates.title: Corporate tax registration & first returns
updates.summary: Most businesses must register for corporate tax and file within 9 months of their first financial year-end. Check your deadline on the FTA portal.

updates.title: Small Business Relief
updates.summary: Businesses with revenue under AED 3,000,000 may elect Small Business Relief for eligible tax periods.

updates.title: VAT remains 5%
updates.summary: Standard VAT 5%; registration is mandatory above AED 375,000 taxable supplies.
